description: Call GET /api/v1/google/maps/places for Google SERP Maps Places through Just Serp API.

operations.description: Get Google maps Place Details data, including contact details and business information, for enrich business directories, look up place details, and sync local app data.

parameters.description: The unique Google Place ID. Obtainable via the Google Maps Search API. Use this or 'data_id'.
parameters.name: place_id

parameters.description: The unique Google Maps location data ID. Use this or 'place_id'.
parameters.name: data_id

parameters.description: Set the target country code (e.g., 'us', 'uk') to localize results. See Google Countries.
parameters.name: country

responses.description: Authentication failed: API Key is invalid or missing
Access denied: Insufficient credits or quota exceeded
Internal server error or upstream service exception
